ucs.title: [LLM] BlackCat/ALPHV (Noberus) Rust encryptor launch via `--access-token` CLI flag
ucs.description: Hunts for execution of the BlackCat/ALPHV ransomware binary, which requires an operator-supplied `--access-token` argument (and pairs with `--child-process`, `--propagated`, `--paths`, `--no-prop`, `--ui` etc.) to decrypt the embedded config. This argument scheme is unique to the Noberus Rust encryptor and is present even when affiliates rename the binary.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.process_path) as image values(Processes.user) as user values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process="*--access-token*" AND (Processes.process="*--child-process*" OR Processes.process="*--propagated*" OR Processes.process="*--paths*" OR Processes.process="*--no-prop*" OR Processes.process="*--ui*" OR Processes.process="*--bypass*" OR Processes.process="*--drag-and-drop*" OR Processes.process="*--prop-file*") by host Processes.process_name Processes.process_hash | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
// BlackCat/Noberus encryptor requires an operator access token to decrypt embedded JSON config
| where ProcessCommandLine has "--access-token"
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("--child-process","--propagated","--paths","--no-prop","--ui","--bypass","--drag-and-drop","--prop-file","--access-token-disable")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, FolderPath, SHA256,
          ProcessCommandLine,
          ParentImage = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ParentCmd   = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          IsRemoteSession = InitiatingProcessTokenElevation
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where CommandLine has "--access-token"
| where CommandLine has_any ("--child-process","--propagated","--paths","--no-prop","--ui","--bypass","--drag-and-drop","--prop-file","--access-token-disable")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, NewProcessName, CommandLine, ParentProcessName, TokenElevationType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: BlackCat/ALPHV Rust Encryptor Execution via --access-token Flag
id: 8e2c7a91-blackcat-accesstoken-001
status: experimental
description: Detects BlackCat/ALPHV (Noberus) ransomware encryptor invocation. The Rust binary requires an operator-supplied --access-token to decrypt its embedded config, paired with operational flags (--child-process, --propagated, --paths, --no-prop, --ui).
references:
  - https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/2022/06/13/the-many-lives-of-blackcat-ransomware/
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa23-353a
author: Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/08
tags:
  - attack.impact
  - attack.t1486
  - threat.actor.alphv
  - threat.actor.blackcat
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_token:
    CommandLine|contains: '--access-token'
  selection_flag:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - '--child-process'
      - '--propagated'
      - '--paths'
      - '--no-prop'
      - '--ui'
      - '--bypass'
      - '--drag-and-drop'
      - '--prop-file'
      - '--access-token-disable'
  condition: selection_token and selection_flag
falsepositives:
  - Highly unlikely; only collisions are with custom administrative scripts that happen to use both an --access-token argument and one of the BlackCat-specific operational flags in the same command line.
level: critical
ucs.rationale: The `--access-token` parameter is hard-coded into the BlackCat/ALPHV Rust source — the binary will not run without it, and Microsoft, Mandiant and CISA AA23-353A all document this exact CLI surface (`--child-process`, `--propagated`, `--no-prop`, `--paths`, `--ui`). Renaming the binary or changing its hash does not strip the flags. Affiliates may use Linux/ESXi variants but the same flags persist.
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID

ucs.title: [LLM] BlackCat/ALPHV pre-encryption recovery-inhibition + backup/EDR service kill chain
ucs.description: Hunts the characteristic BlackCat staging sequence on a single host within a 30-minute window: shadow-copy deletion (vssadmin/wmic) + boot-recovery disable (bcdedit) + Windows Backup catalog wipe (wbadmin) co-occurring with stops of Veeam/MSSQL/EDR services (memtas, mepocs, Sophos, SentinelOne). Microsoft DART, Mandiant FIN7-ALPHV reporting, and CISA AA23-353A all document this exact ordered combo as the affiliate playbook minutes before the encryptor fires.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.process_name) as binary values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name IN ("vssadmin.exe","wmic.exe","bcdedit.exe","wbadmin.exe","sc.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")) AND ((Processes.process="*delete shadows*") OR (Processes.process="*shadowcopy*" AND Processes.process="*delete*") OR (Processes.process="*recoveryenabled*No*") OR (Processes.process="*bootstatuspolicy*ignoreallfailures*") OR (Processes.process="*delete catalog*") OR (Processes.process="*delete backup*") OR (Processes.process="*delete systemstatebackup*") OR ((Processes.process="*stop*" OR Processes.process="*Stop-Service*") AND (Processes.process="*Veeam*" OR Processes.process="*MSSQL*" OR Processes.process="*SQLWriter*" OR Processes.process="*MSExchange*" OR Processes.process="*BackupExec*" OR Processes.process="*memtas*" OR Processes.process="*mepocs*" OR Processes.process="*Sophos*" OR Processes.process="*SAVAdminService*" OR Processes.process="*Sentinel*" OR Processes.process="*CrowdStrike*"))) by host Processes.user _time span=30m | eval action=case(match(cmdline,"(?i)delete shadows|shadowcopy.*delete"),"VSS_DELETE", match(cmdline,"(?i)recoveryenabled No|bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures"),"BCDEDIT_RECOVERY_OFF", match(cmdline,"(?i)delete (catalog|backup|systemstatebackup)"),"WBADMIN_WIPE", match(cmdline,"(?i)Veeam|MSSQL|MSExchange|BackupExec|memtas|mepocs|Sophos|Sentinel|CrowdStrike"),"BACKUP_OR_EDR_KILL", true(),"OTHER") | stats values(action) as actions values(cmdline) as cmdlines values(binary) as binaries by host user _time | eval action_count=mvcount(actions) | where action_count >= 2 | `security_content_ctime(_time)`
ucs.kql:
let WindowMinutes = 30m;
let recovery_inhibit =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where (FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe"  and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("delete","shadows"))
         or (FileName =~ "wmic.exe"      and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
         or (FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe"   and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("recoveryenabled No","bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures"))
         or (FileName =~ "wbadmin.exe"   and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("delete catalog","delete backup","delete systemstatebackup"))
    | extend ActionKind = case(
        FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe",  "VSS_DELETE",
        FileName =~ "wmic.exe",      "VSS_DELETE",
        FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe",   "BCDEDIT_RECOVERY_OFF",
        FileName =~ "wbadmin.exe",   "WBADMIN_WIPE",
        "OTHER");
let service_kill =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where (FileName in~ ("net.exe","net1.exe","sc.exe") and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("stop ","delete ","config "))
         or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Stop-Service","Set-Service"))
    // ALPHV affiliate kill-list seen by Microsoft DART / Mandiant
    | where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Veeam","VeeamBackup","SQLWriter","MSSQLSERVER","MSExchange","BackupExec","memtas","mepocs","Sophos","SAVAdminService","SentinelAgent","CrowdStrike","CarbonBlack","vmms","vmcompute")
    | extend ActionKind = "BACKUP_OR_EDR_KILL"
    | project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, ActionKind,
              KillCmd = ProcessCommandLine, KillBinary = FileName;
recovery_inhibit
| join kind=inner (service_kill
        | project DeviceName, KillTime = Timestamp, KillCmd, KillBinary, KillAction = ActionKind
    ) on DeviceName
| where KillTime between (Timestamp - WindowMinutes .. Timestamp + WindowMinutes)
| summarize FirstSeen = min(Timestamp), LastSeen = max(KillTime),
            Actions = make_set(strcat(ActionKind, "|", KillAction)),
            RecoveryCmds = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 25),
            ServiceKillCmds = make_set(KillCmd, 25)
            by DeviceName, AccountName
| where array_length(Actions) >= 2     // at least one recovery-inhibit + one service-kill correlated on same host
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let WindowMinutes = 30m;
let recovery_inhibit =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | where (NewProcessName endswith "\\vssadmin.exe" and CommandLine has_all ("delete","shadows"))
         or (NewProcessName endswith "\\wmic.exe"     and CommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
         or (NewProcessName endswith "\\bcdedit.exe"  and CommandLine has_any ("recoveryenabled No","bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures"))
         or (NewProcessName endswith "\\wbadmin.exe"  and CommandLine has_any ("delete catalog","delete backup","delete systemstatebackup"))
    | extend ActionKind = case(
        NewProcessName endswith "\\vssadmin.exe", "VSS_DELETE",
        NewProcessName endswith "\\wmic.exe",     "VSS_DELETE",
        NewProcessName endswith "\\bcdedit.exe",  "BCDEDIT_RECOVERY_OFF",
        NewProcessName endswith "\\wbadmin.exe",  "WBADMIN_WIPE",
        "OTHER")
    | project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, ActionKind, CommandLine, NewProcessName;
let service_kill =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | where (NewProcessName has_any ("\\net.exe","\\net1.exe","\\sc.exe") and CommandLine has_any ("stop ","delete ","config "))
         or (NewProcessName has_any ("\\powershell.exe","\\pwsh.exe") and CommandLine has_any ("Stop-Service","Set-Service"))
    | where CommandLine has_any ("Veeam","VeeamBackup","SQLWriter","MSSQLSERVER","MSExchange","BackupExec","memtas","mepocs","Sophos","SAVAdminService","SentinelAgent","CrowdStrike","CarbonBlack","vmms","vmcompute")
    | extend KillAction = "BACKUP_OR_EDR_KILL"
    | project Computer, KillTime = TimeGenerated, KillAction, KillCmd = CommandLine;
recovery_inhibit
| join kind=inner service_kill on Computer
| where KillTime between (TimeGenerated - WindowMinutes .. TimeGenerated + WindowMinutes)
| summarize FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen = max(KillTime),
            Actions = make_set(strcat(ActionKind, "|", KillAction)),
            RecoveryCmds = make_set(CommandLine, 25),
            ServiceKillCmds = make_set(KillCmd, 25)
            by Computer, Account
| where array_length(Actions) >= 2
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.rationale: Each individual action (vssadmin delete, bcdedit, sc stop Veeam) generates noise on its own — backup admins legitimately script some of them. What is BlackCat/ALPHV-specific is the *correlation*: CISA AA23-353A and Microsoft Threat Intel both document the affiliate runbook of inhibiting recovery AND killing Veeam/MSSQL/EDR services on the same host within minutes, immediately before dropping the R
